---
title: "Excel workflow"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Excel workflow}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, eval=FALSE}
make_fake_folder(
  "data/private",
  "data/fake",
  xlsx_sheets = "all",
  overwrite = TRUE
)
```

Excel handling supports `.xlsx` and `.xls` inputs, preserves sheet names, and
fakes tabular cell values. Legacy `.xls` files are written as `.xlsx` outputs
with the same base name because the current optional writer does not produce old
BIFF `.xls` workbooks.

Workbook styling, formulas, comments, hidden sheets, merged cells, and metadata
are not guaranteed to be preserved.
